title: Modpack for my personal server
description: Semi-Large Modpack with a focus on exploration, automation, & magic. There are a few mods that I try to achieve this with, Valkyrien Skies, Create, & Ars Nouveau. I've also included mods like Farmer's Delight and Biomes O' Plenty
body:
Semi-large modpack (133 mods as of writing) for my private minecraft server.

Most game changing mods are the following; Create, VS2, Ars Nouveau

List of the mods as of writing:
